headlines.title: Tuesday’s primaries to set up key fall matchups in Nebraska
headlines.description: Tuesday’s primary elections in Nebraska will set the stage for November in a battleground House district, as well as a potentially competitive Senate contest, as Democrats try to win control of Congress.

headlines.title: AOC says Democrats shouldn’t trust Majorie Taylor Greene
headlines.description: When Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez singled out former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene as an “antisemite” and a “bigot” in public remarks Friday, she rattled more than a few cages.

headlines.title: GOP Rep. Jen Kiggans faces backlash for agreeing with ‘cotton-picking’ comment about Hakeem Jeffries
headlines.description: Rep. Jen Kiggans, a Virginia Republican, is under fire after she agreed with a comment that Hakeem Jeffries should get his “cotton-picking hands off of Virginia.”

headlines.title: Mayor of Southern California city to plead guilty to acting as agent of China, feds say
headlines.description: The mayor of the Los Angeles-area city of Arcadia has resigned and will plead guilty to illegally acting as an agent of China, officials said Monday.

headlines.title: Trump Says Fragile US-Iran Ceasefire is on ‘Massive Life Support’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is warning that the fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran is hanging on by a thread. "I would say the ceasefire is on massive life support," he said. It comes as Iran’s lead negotiator posted that the longer the Trump administration "drag their feet, the more American taxpayers will pay for it.” NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump Set to Meet With China's Xi Jinping: Here's What is at Stake
headlines.description: President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping are expected to publicly emphasize stability during Thursday’s high-stakes summit after the two superpowers have been locked in an escalating economic struggle over trade, access to China’s rare earth minerals and AI. Trump is also suggesting he’ll lean on Xi to force Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Black lawmakers speak out against Alabama redistricting plan
headlines.description: Several Black lawmakers in Alabama are voicing their frustrations over the Republican push for redistricting in the state, with some saying the fight over the district maps feels personal. WSFA’s Nai Remy reports.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: U.S. and China arrest 5 in joint drug smuggling investigation ahead of Trump trip
headlines.description: U.S. and Chinese authorities jointly arrested five suspects in a cross-border smuggling and trafficking operation, Beijing said Monday, touting the cooperation ahead of President Donald Trump’s state visit this week.

headlines.title: James Comey says seashells case illustrates Trump’s ‘bottomless desire’ for revenge
headlines.description: Former FBI Director James Comey said the Trump administration’s pursuit of another indictment against him — this time over an Instagram photo of seashells — reflects the president’s fixation on going after his critics.
